last_user_message:
## Role
You are polishing the Phase-1 autodoc-clone (React+Vite+Tailwind). Work dir = `/workspace/autodoc-clone`. Self-test with build + Playwright. Report changes; do NOT self-evaluate against a rubric.

## Feedback to address (from external review ‚Äî 2 MAJORs, both real)

### Fix 1 ‚Äî Bottom Buscar CTA hover never fires (button disabled at rest)
The bottom `Buscar` CTA has `disabled={!canSearch}` (or equivalent) so the browser never dispatches `:hover`/`onMouseEnter` on it ‚Äî the orange hover transition the spec wants never appears.
**Fix:** Keep the button ENABLED (remove the `disabled` attribute) and guard at click time instead: in the `onClick` handler, if the selection is incomplete, early-return (optionally show a subtle hint) rather than submitting. Apply the hover styling via CSS (`:hover { background: #0074F1 }`) so the transition works at rest. The button must still ALWAYS be visually blue `#0068D7` at rest and `#0074F1` on hover ‚Äî never gray. Optionally add `cursor: not-allowed` via a class only when invalid, but keep the element hoverable.

### Fix 2 ‚Äî Horizontal overflow at 1280√ó800
At 1280px the dark sub-nav overflows horizontally (sub-nav min-content > 1280 wrap).
**Fix:** Make the sub-nav horizontally scrollable on narrow viewports: add `overflow-x-auto` (with `whitespace-nowrap` on the list and hidden scrollbar if you like) to the sub-nav container, OR reduce the item min-width/gaps. CRITICAL: do NOT set `min-w-[1280px]` (or any fixed min-width ‚â•1280) on the root/container ‚Äî that forces overflow. Verify `document.documentElement.scrollWidth <= window.innerWidth` at 1280, 1440, 1920 via Playwright.

## Also verify (don't break what works)
- `npm run build` still exits 0.
- 10-item sub-nav order unchanged, CTA still always blue, semantic `<header>`, banner width 735px, autoplay, 0 console errors, no autodoc.es requests.

## Self-test (Playwright, `NODE_PATH=/app/node_modules`)
Write `/workspace/autodoc-clone/verify_polish.mjs`:
1. Build: `npm run build` exit 0.
2. Start dev server (`npm run dev` on a free port), load it at 1280√ó800, 1440√ó900, 1920√ó1080.
3. At each viewport: assert `document.documentElement.scrollWidth <= window.innerWidth` (no horizontal overflow).
4. Hover the bottom Buscar CTA (`page.hover`), read computed `backgroundColor` ‚Üí must be `#0074F1` (rgb 0,116,241). At rest (no hover) ‚Üí `#0068D7`.
5. CTA still never gray (`#9C9C9C`).
6. Screenshot 1280 + 1440 ‚Üí `/workspace/clone-web/team-log/screens/clone_polish_1280.png` and `clone_polish_1440.png`.

## Report
- Files changed + the exact diff approach for each fix.
- Build exit code.
- The 3-viewport overflow numbers + the hover/rest CTA color numbers.
- Screenshot paths.
Keep surgical. Don't rewrite components wholesale. Stop when self-tests pass.
